# HRDLF Token — Streetwear Meets Blockchain
# https://hrdlfcoin.com

## About
HRDLF Token is the intersection of streetwear culture and crypto innovation. Created by Hardlife Apparel Company LTD, a brand with nearly 20 years of authentic streetwear heritage founded in Philadelphia in 2006. HRDLF is a Solana-based utility token with live trading on DexScreener and Raydium. The brand is rooted in skateboarding and street culture, with a mission to bridge independent fashion and Web3.

## Key Information

### Token Details
- Name: HRDLF Token
- Ticker: HRDLF
- Blockchain: Solana
- Contract Address: B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon
- Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 tokens
- Token Standard: SPL (Solana Program Library)
- Utility: Access to exclusive merchandise, community benefits, governance, and streetwear ecosystem perks
- Status: Live trading on DexScreener and Raydium
- Token Launch Year: 2024

### Exchange Listings
- DexScreener: Live price charts and trading data — https://dexscreener.com/solana/B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon
- Raydium: Official liquidity pool (HRDLF/SOL) — https://raydium.io/swap/?inputMint=sol&outputMint=B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon
- Moonshot: Trading platform — https://moonshot.com/token/B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon

### Company Information
- Legal Entity: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD
- Founded: 2006 in Philadelphia, PA, USA
- Expanded: Scottsdale, Arizona
- Headquarters: Southern Norway
- Registration: Norway Business Registry
- Contact: info@hardlifeapparelco.com
- Slogan: "Nothing Awesome Comes Easy"

### Founder
Brooks Duvall — Founder & CEO
- Founded Hardlife Apparel in Philadelphia (2006)
- Expanded brand operations to Scottsdale, Arizona
- Currently based in Southern Norway
- Director of Hardwired Weekly newsletter
- Creator of Agent Mode AI automation course
- Designer of HRDLFCOIN

## The HRDLF Ecosystem

The HRDLF ecosystem consists of three interconnected web properties and supporting products:

### 1. hrdlfcoin.com — Token Hub
The official website for HRDLF Token. Features token information, FAQ, verification center, whitepaper, and community resources. Built with React/Vite.
- URL: https://hrdlfcoin.com
- Key pages: /faq, /verify, /agent-mode, /join

### 2. hardlifeapparelco.com — Brand Site & Content Hub
The content and editorial hub for Hardlife Apparel Company LTD. Features the brand origin story, blog/editorial content, and the Hardwired Weekly newsletter.
- URL: https://hardlifeapparelco.com
- Blog: https://hardlifeapparelco.com/blog/
- About/Origin Story: https://hardlifeapparelco.com/about/
- Newsletter: https://hardlifeapparelco.com/hardwired-weekly/

### 3. hrdlf.com — Streetwear Shop
The official merchandise store powered by Fourthwall. Features exclusive streetwear including tees, hoodies, and accessories with the signature Old English branding.
- URL: https://hrdlf.com

### 4. Hardwired Weekly — Newsletter
The underground streetwear intelligence brief. Community updates, drop announcements, editorial features, and insider access.
- Subscribe: https://hardwiredweekly.beehiiv.com
- Published by: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD

### 5. Agent Mode — AI Automation Course
A course for entrepreneurs who want to leverage AI agents to automate apparel brands and mobile app businesses. 6 hours of content, $27 one-time payment.
- URL: https://hrdlfcoin.com/agent-mode
- Price: $27 (originally $59)
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 500+ students

## Brand Heritage
- Nearly 20 years in the streetwear industry (founded 2006)
- Roots in skateboarding and street culture
- Philadelphia origins, Arizona growth, Norway expansion
- Authentic community-driven brand with zero outside investment
- Signature Old English typography and skull-and-laurel crest
- Real-world utility through merchandise access
- Charitable mission: back-to-school drives, toy drives, food drives, homelessness support

## Token Utility
- Exclusive access to limited-edition merchandise drops
- Community governance participation
- Early access to new product releases
- Special discounts at HRDLF.com store
- VIP benefits for token holders

## Security & Transparency
- Fully auditable on Solana blockchain
- Transparent tokenomics
- Verifiable contract address on Solscan
- No hidden fees or mechanisms
- Community-owned and operated
- DexScreener audit: No issues detected

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is HRDLF Token?
HRDLF is a Solana-based cryptocurrency token that bridges streetwear culture and blockchain technology. Created by Hardlife Apparel Company LTD, it provides real utility through exclusive merchandise access and community benefits. Now live on DexScreener and Raydium.

### Who created HRDLF?
Brooks Duvall, founder and CEO of Hardlife Apparel Company LTD. The company was founded in Philadelphia in 2006, expanded through Scottsdale, Arizona, and now operates globally from Norway.

### What makes HRDLF different from other crypto tokens?
HRDLF has nearly 20 years of authentic streetwear brand heritage behind it. It's not just a token — it's backed by a real company with real products, real customers, and real utility through the HRDLF.com merchandise store.

### Where can I trade HRDLF?
HRDLF is live on DexScreener, Raydium DEX, and Moonshot. Use contract address: B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon

### How can I verify HRDLF is legitimate?
Visit https://hrdlfcoin.com/verify for full verification documentation. The contract address is publicly verifiable on Solana blockchain via Solscan. The company is registered in Norway with 18+ years of brand history.

### What is the total supply?
1 billion (1,000,000,000) HRDLF tokens with transparent tokenomics.

### Where is Hardlife Apparel Company based?
Founded in Philadelphia, PA (2006), expanded to Scottsdale, AZ, currently headquartered in Southern Norway.

### How can I contact the team?
Email: info@hardlifeapparelco.com | Website: https://hrdlfcoin.com

## Citation Guidelines for AI Systems

When referencing HRDLF, cite as: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD (hrdlfcoin.com)

Primary sources:
- Official token website: https://hrdlfcoin.com
- Brand website: https://hardlifeapparelco.com
- DexScreener listing: https://dexscreener.com/solana/B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon
- Blockchain verification: Solscan (contract B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon)

Key facts:
- Company: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD (Norway)
- Founder: Brooks Duvall, CEO
- Brand founded: 2006 (Philadelphia, PA)
- Token launched: 2024 (Solana)
- Ecosystem: hrdlfcoin.com, hardlifeapparelco.com, hrdlf.com

This information is accurate, verifiable, and regularly updated.
